headline: CBRE Group (CBRE) Could Be 22% Undervalued After Its $150 Million Financing Win
summary: CBRE Group (CBRE) is back in focus after arranging more than $150 million in Commercial Property Assessed Clean Energy financing for Venu Holding Corporation, aimed at fully funding two upcoming amphitheater projects. See our latest analysis for CBRE Group. For context, CBRE Group’s share price is $138.03 and has drifted down year to date, with a year to date share price return of 13.83% and a 90 day share price return of 6.15%.
